response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: For the first song 'Summer Chocolate', the reference JSON was incomplete/had no lyrics, so manual transcription and translation were fully executed. For 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie', the reference JSON provided correct Japanese lyrics which matched the audio perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: Fully leveraged for the second song's spelling and vocabulary, while manual transcription was utilized for the first song's lyrics and the spoken English transition between scenes.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed and divided subtitle segments to align seamlessly with the beat, dance structure, and vocal boundaries. No overlaps or delays.

subtitles.original: テンパリングが大事
熱すぎても 飽きちゃって
subtitles.english: ...even if it's too hot, we'll get tired of it...

subtitles.original: 冷たいのはダメ、やだもん
subtitles.english: ...and cold is no good, I hate it!

subtitles.original: チョコみたいな私を
プレシャスにして 扱って
炭酸のお酒で
シュワシュワシュワ
愛は伝えなきゃ届かない
subtitles.english: Love won't reach unless you express it...

subtitles.original: 恋してる証拠に ここでチューして
subtitles.english: ...as proof of your love, kiss me right here!

subtitles.original: 夜空のグラスに
subtitles.english: In the glass of the night sky...

subtitles.original: キラキラをオンして
息もできないくらいに 踊って自爆して
subtitles.english: ...dance so much that we can't even breathe!

subtitles.original: だって だって だって
恋に溺れて
君の熱で溶けたら
subtitles.english: If I melt from your warmth...

subtitles.original: そのまま食べてよ
手、ベトベトついたって Limits
subtitles.english: Even if your hands get all sticky...

subtitles.original: いっしょ、いっしょ
甘いお酒 ほろ酔い
ウインクでストロング
リキュールじゃもう 酔えない
subtitles.english: Liqueur can't make me drunk anymore...

subtitles.original: ラブで満たして お願い
お砂糖は増しましで
甘い甘さじゃ足りない_
灼熱で溶かして
特急で飲んで_
癖のある私だからさ_
subtitles.english: Because I have my quirks, you see..._

subtitles.original: 君に選ばれたサマーチョコレート_
subtitles.english: ...I'm the summer chocolate chosen by you!

subtitles.original: トロトロトロンにベイビー
とろけちゃってハッピー_
ぴゅあぴゅあ ココアふわり
うるうる ワン・ツー_
いぇーい！
What's up, everybody?
Can you hear me?
It's Yozora Mel!_
Noel-chan, dōzo!_
To my sweet badas? Yes, Shirogane Noel is in the house!
subtitles.english: To my sweet badas? Yes, Shirogane Noel is in the house!

subtitles.original: It's time to get up!_
We have a hot new song!
subtitles.english: We have a hot new song!

subtitles.original: That's from AKB48!
To make you feel good!_
Koisuru Fortune Cookie!_
So let's jump and crazy!
あなたのことが好きなのに
私にまるで興味ない
subtitles.english: ...you have absolutely no interest in me.

subtitles.original: 何度目かの失恋の準備
Yeah! Yeah! Yeah!
まわりを見れば大勢の_
subtitles.english: If I look around, there are so many...

subtitles.original: 可愛いコたちがいるんだもん_
地味な花は気づいてくれない
subtitles.english: You won't notice a plain flower like me.

subtitles.original: Yeah! Yeah! Yeah!
カフェテリア流れるMusic_
subtitles.english: Music is playing in the cafeteria..._

subtitles.original: ぼんやり聴いていたら_
知らぬ間にリズムに合わせ_
subtitles.english: Before I know it, to the rhythm..._

subtitles.original: つま先から動き出す
止められない今の気持ち_
subtitles.english: I can't stop these feelings now.

subtitles.original: カモン カモン カモン カモン ベイビー_
subtitles.english: Come on, come on, come on, come on baby..._

subtitles.original: 占ってよ
恋するフォーチュンクッキー!_
未来は そんな悪くないよ_
Hey! Hey! Hey!
ツキを呼ぶには 笑顔を見せること
subtitles.english: To bring good luck, show a smile.

subtitles.original: ハートのフォーチュンクッキー
運勢 今日よりもよくしよう_
subtitles.english: ...let's make our luck better than today!_

subtitles.original: Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!_
subtitles.english: Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!

subtitles.original: 人生捨てたもんじゃないよね_
subtitles.english: Life isn't so bad after all, is it?

subtitles.original: あっと驚く奇跡が起きる_
あなたとどこかで愛し合える予感
subtitles.english: ...a feeling that we'll love each other somewhere.
